notes: This file is owned by Agent 15 only.
Structure nests rounds inside sprints to keep history organized.
Agent 15 was stood up in wk28-assembler-spike as the owner of Kenney kit prefabs for buildings.

sprint_meta.notes: Agent 15 is created this sprint. Role focus: prefab schema authorship + round-trip acceptance test of the assembler tool.

asks: Draft assets/prefabs/schema.md v0.1 (fields per the plan).
Create assets/prefabs/buildings/ directory (empty for wk28; populated in wk29).
Acceptance test the tool from Agent 12: place 3 Kenney pieces, rotate, delete one, save, reopen; confirm visual round-trip.
Report any tool gaps back to Agent 12 before wk28 closes.
acceptance_criteria: assets/prefabs/schema.md exists and matches wk28 plan schema.
Round-trip save/reopen of a test prefab produces an identical visual result.

assets/prefabs/buildings/.gitkeep — empty buildings dir for wk29 prefab JSON outputs.

visual_review.notes: Visual round-trip and in-tool rendering confirmed good; ready for sprint close.
